name: Hot Pepper Jelly
recipeIngredient: Certo or Sure-Jel pectin (6 oz bottle)
3/4 cup sweet ground peppers, such as banana or red bell pepper
1/4 cup hot ground peppers, such as jalapeño or habanero
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and grind the peppers.
2. Combine all ingredients except the pectin in a large pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the Certo or Sure-Jel pectin until dissolved.
6. Pour the jelly into sterilized jars, leaving at least 1/2 inch headspace.
7. Seal the jars and process them in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes (makes seven one-half pint jars).
